chapter_title.ar: باب غُسْلِ الْأَطْفَالِ وَ الصِّبْيَانِ وَ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَيْهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 73 – Washing the children and boys, and the Salaat upon them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/131)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/131)
text: السِّقْطُ إِذَا تَمَّ لَهُ أَرْبَعَةُ أَشْهُرٍ غُسِّلَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Musa, from Zurara,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The miscarried child, when four months are completed for it, would be washed (prior to burial)’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Musa from Zurarah from who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A miscarried child (fetus) after four months is given Ghusl (bath).’”
